positive: Minimalist celestial mountain range silhouette, featuring stylized peaks and crescent moons nestled within the peaks. The design should have a bold, deep navy blue and cosmic gold ink palette, printed on a clean, light cream background. Central composition, perfect for apparel. Include small, abstract constellations represented by geometric dots and thin lines. The style should be inspired by Art Deco geometry and scientific astronomical charts, emphasizing clean lines and high contrast. Intricate details only within the silhouettes, keeping the overall feel clean and punchy. Perfect symmetry and perfect alignment of all elements. Vector art, highly stylized, clean cutout, isolated on background.
